title: taraxacum flugum
intro: Taraxacum flugum, also known as the common dandelion, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion genus. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support liver and kidney function. The health benefits of Taraxacum flugum include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Taraxacum flugum is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be used as a food ingredient in salads and other dishes.
